hook.summary: Children exploring a lush forest and playing by a stream.
hook.visual_action: Four children in outdoor gear walk away from the camera into the woods, followed by a girl launching a leaf boat in a stream.

scene_flow: Group of children walking into a sunlit forest carrying sticks.
Kids playing by a rocky stream, launching leaf boats and helping each other cross rocks.
Montage of children running through tall grass and climbing trees.
Close-up shots highlighting colorful watches on the children's wrists during their activities.
Final scene of two children holding hands in a field with the brand logo appearing.
audience_proxy: Parents of active children aged 4-10 looking for durable and stylish outdoor accessories.
